title: check-missing-frontmatter expected output
description: Asserts that /personal-workflow check correctly identifies a feature tracker with deliberately incomplete frontmatter (only name + type present; id/status/created/updated/repo/branch/blocked_by missing). Schema requires overall=FAIL, frontmatter.status=FAIL, and at least 3 missing_fields entries.

overall.description: Must be FAIL because frontmatter is incomplete.

status.description: Must be FAIL — required fields are missing.

missing_fields.description: Must list at least 3 missing fields. Fixture omits 7 fields (id, status, created, updated, repo, branch, blocked_by); a robust validator should find at least 3 of them.
